message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Ignore agent-generated throwaway test/scratch scripts (test*.sh,
test*.ts), node_modules_trash directories from hot-reload crashes,
and manifest build artifacts (packages/manifest/apps/, scripts/).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -198,3 +198,14 @@ gemini.mcp.json
 
 # Next.js trash directories (leftover from hot-reload crashes)
 .next_trash_*/
+node_modules_trash*/
+
+# Agent-generated throwaway root-level test/scratch scripts
+/test.sh
+/test.ts
+/test[0-9]*.sh
+/test[0-9]*.ts
+
+# Manifest build artifacts (generated by bun run generate)
+packages/manifest/apps/
+packages/manifest/scripts/
